_wiring: VAL is wired to the same OpenAI-compatible RMIT NPE gateway used by h5p Creator: POST https://val-npe.rmit.edu.au/api/chat/completions. Set VAL_API_KEY on the SAGE server (never in this file, never from users), then confirm via GET /api/admin/status in an admin deployment. Adjust auth_header/auth_scheme only if the gateway changes to a non-standard header.
_env_overrides: base_url, api_style, and model above may each be overridden at runtime by VAL_BASE_URL, VAL_API_STYLE, VAL_MODEL (e.g. in .env locally, or a hosting dashboard for staging) — useful for pointing at a different VAL model/gateway without editing this file. VAL_API_KEY is always an env var, never a file value.
